name: RABBIT-CAGE-25
title: rabbit-bug skill dispatches raw Agent for scope resolution instead of invoking rabbit-feature-scope skill
description: The rabbit-bug Filing Protocol calls resolve-scope.sh and dispatches a bare Agent, duplicating the logic already encapsulated in the rabbit-feature-scope skill. It should invoke the skill instead.

history.note: [skip-vet: Bug evaluated inline: SKILL.md already reads 'Invoke rabbit-feature-scope to identify the related feature' — no raw Agent dispatch present] Fix already landed in 7d29d0d: rabbit-bug SKILL.md Step 1 already invokes rabbit-feature-scope
